stories.title: Code originality audit — rename transistorsoft-copied names
Edge case handling — GPS off, permission revoked, app killed, rapid start/stop, double-start
stories.notes: Guards added for double-start, stop-when-not-tracking, setConfig-when-not-tracking. GPS off/permission revoked handled via provider change listeners. App killed handled via START_STICKY + significantLocationChanges + config persistence.

stories.title: Config refactor — simplify LocationConfig to 6 fields
Native code quality — thread safety, memory leaks, lifecycle handling
stories.notes: Thread safety: mainHandler.post for all Android stream emissions, CopyOnWriteArrayList for listeners. iOS delegates run on main thread. Memory: all timers use [weak self] on iOS, listeners removed in stopTracking/onDetachedFromEngine on Android. Wake lock properly released in onDestroy.
